source_rationale: Type II HCs and SCs express SOX2 (Fig. 1B). Thus, Sox2/SOX2 is a marker for these cell types in the vestibular sensory epithelia (Jan et al., 2021; Wilkerson et al., 2021).

Genes encoding axonemal dynein (IDAs and ODAs), such as Dnah5 and Dnah6, as well as radial spoke components (Wdr66, Cfap206, Cfap61, Iqub), N-DRC components (Drc1, Iqca), and MIPs (Cfap126, Wdr63) were predominantly expressed in vestibular HCs with little to no expression in cochlear HCs (Fig. 5G).
